```{r conservative suppression}
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(1, 4),
    breaks = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
    labels = c("Not at all", "Not too much", "A good amount", "A great deal"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Trust in Institutions by Perceived Fraud and Suppression",
    subtitle = "Weighted regression predictions with 95% confidence intervals",
    x = "Perceived Frequency",
    y = "Trust",
    color = "Threat Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10, lineheight = 1.1),
    panel.spacing = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(12, 18, 12, 18)
  )






library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)

trust_long <- issue %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(WEIGHT),
    !is.na(suppression_perception_rev),
    !is.na(fraud_perception_rev)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WEIGHT,
    suppression_perception_rev,
    fraud_perception_rev,
    trust_legislature,
    trust_president,
    trust_congress,
    trust_state_elections,
    trust_local_elections
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      trust_legislature,
      trust_president,
      trust_congress,
      trust_state_elections,
      trust_local_elections
    ),
    names_to = "institution",
    values_to = "trust"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(trust))

models_supp <- trust_long %>%
  split(.$institution) %>%
  map(~ lm(
    trust ~ suppression_perception_rev,
    data = .x,
    weights = WEIGHT
  ))

models_fraud <- trust_long %>%
  split(.$institution) %>%
  map(~ lm(
    trust ~ fraud_perception_rev,
    data = .x,
    weights = WEIGHT
  ))

pred_supp <- map_df(names(models_supp), function(inst) {
  mod <- models_supp[[inst]]
  p <- predict(
    mod,
    newdata = data.frame(suppression_perception_rev = 1:4),
    se.fit = TRUE
  )

  data.frame(
    institution = inst,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = as.numeric(p$fit),
    lower = as.numeric(p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    upper = as.numeric(p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    type = "Suppression"
  )
})

pred_fraud <- map_df(names(models_fraud), function(inst) {
  mod <- models_fraud[[inst]]
  p <- predict(
    mod,
    newdata = data.frame(fraud_perception_rev = 1:4),
    se.fit = TRUE
  )

  data.frame(
    institution = inst,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = as.numeric(p$fit),
    lower = as.numeric(p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    upper = as.numeric(p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    type = "Fraud"
  )
})

pred_all <- bind_rows(pred_supp, pred_fraud) %>%
  mutate(
    institution = recode(
      institution,
      trust_legislature = "State Legislature",
      trust_president = "President",
      trust_congress = "Congress",
      trust_state_elections = "State Election Officials",
      trust_local_elections = "Local Election Officials"
    ),
    institution = stringr::str_wrap(institution, width = 22)
  )

ggplot(pred_all, aes(x = x, y = fit, color = type, group = type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.08, linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~institution) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Rarely", "Occasionally", "Somewhat often", "Very often")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
    labels = c("Not at all", "Not too much", "A good amount", "A great deal"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Trust in Institutions by Perceived Fraud and Suppression",
    subtitle = "Weighted regression predictions with 95% confidence intervals",
    x = "Perceived Frequency",
    y = "Trust",
    color = "Threat Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10, lineheight = 1.1),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.9, "lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 16, 10, 16)
  )






library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)

trust_long <- issue %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(WEIGHT),
    !is.na(suppression_perception_rev),
    !is.na(fraud_perception_rev)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WEIGHT,
    suppression_perception_rev,
    fraud_perception_rev,
    trust_legislature,
    trust_president,
    trust_congress,
    trust_state_elections,
    trust_local_elections
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      trust_legislature,
      trust_president,
      trust_congress,
      trust_state_elections,
      trust_local_elections
    ),
    names_to = "institution",
    values_to = "trust"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(trust))

models_supp <- trust_long %>%
  split(.$institution) %>%
  map(~ lm(
    trust ~ suppression_perception_rev,
    data = .x,
    weights = WEIGHT
  ))

models_fraud <- trust_long %>%
  split(.$institution) %>%
  map(~ lm(
    trust ~ fraud_perception_rev,
    data = .x,
    weights = WEIGHT
  ))

pred_supp <- map_df(names(models_supp), function(inst) {
  mod <- models_supp[[inst]]
  p <- predict(
    mod,
    newdata = data.frame(suppression_perception_rev = 1:4),
    se.fit = TRUE
  )

  data.frame(
    institution = inst,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = as.numeric(p$fit),
    lower = as.numeric(p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    upper = as.numeric(p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    type = "Suppression"
  )
})

pred_fraud <- map_df(names(models_fraud), function(inst) {
  mod <- models_fraud[[inst]]
  p <- predict(
    mod,
    newdata = data.frame(fraud_perception_rev = 1:4),
    se.fit = TRUE
  )

  data.frame(
    institution = inst,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = as.numeric(p$fit),
    lower = as.numeric(p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    upper = as.numeric(p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    type = "Fraud"
  )
})

pred_all <- bind_rows(pred_supp, pred_fraud) %>%
  mutate(
    institution = recode(
      institution,
      trust_legislature = "State Legislature",
      trust_president = "President",
      trust_congress = "Congress",
      trust_state_elections = "State Election Officials",
      trust_local_elections = "Local Election Officials"
    ),
    institution = stringr::str_wrap(institution, width = 24),
    x_plot = ifelse(type == "Suppression", x - 0.08, x + 0.08)
  )

ggplot(pred_all, aes(x = x_plot, y = fit, color = type, group = type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), linewidth = 0.9, size = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~institution, nrow = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Rarely", "Occasionally", "Somewhat often", "Very often")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
    labels = c("Not at all", "Not too much", "A good amount", "A great deal")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Trust in Institutions by Perceived Fraud and Suppression",
    subtitle = "Weighted regression predictions with 95% confidence intervals",
    x = "Perceived Frequency",
    y = "Trust",
    color = "Threat Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10, lineheight = 1.1),
    panel.spacing = unit(1.1, "lines"),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 20, 10, 20)
  )



```





```{r racial fairness in voting trust}


model_vote_black <- lm(
  conf_own_vote_rev ~ fairness_black_binary + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_vote_black)
#not significant


model_vote_hisp <- lm(
  conf_own_vote_rev ~ fairness_hisp_binary + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_vote_hisp)
#not significant




model_state_black <- lm(
  conf_state_rev ~ fairness_black_binary + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_state_black)
#believing that white people have an advantage has a slightly significant relationship with believing the state will count accurately

model_state_hisp <- lm(
  conf_state_rev ~ fairness_hisp_binary + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_state_hisp)
#hispanic not significance


model_national_black <- lm(
  conf_national_rev ~ fairness_black_binary + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_national_black)
#not significant



model_national_hisp <- lm(
  conf_national_rev ~ fairness_hisp_binary + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_national_hisp)
#hispanic not significant



model_mail_black <- lm(
  conf_mail_rev ~ fairness_black_binary + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_mail_black)
#people who think white people are more priviledged in voting have more confidence in mail


model_mail_hisp <- lm(
  conf_mail_rev ~ fairness_hisp_binary + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_mail_hisp)
#support for mail significantly associated with white support




model_elecday_black <- lm(
  conf_inperson_elecday_rev ~ fairness_black_binary + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_elecday_black)
#not significant


model_elecday_hisp <- lm(
  conf_inperson_elecday_rev ~ fairness_hisp_binary + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_elecday_hisp)
#not significant


model_early_black <- lm(
  conf_inperson_early_rev ~ fairness_black_binary + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_early_black)
#insignificant


model_early_hisp <- lm(
  conf_inperson_early_rev ~ fairness_hisp_binary + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_early_hisp)
#insignificant

```






```{r usps and race}


library(dplyr)

issue <- issue %>%
  mutate(
    usps_eval_clean = na_if(usps_job_clean, -1),
    
    usps_eval_factor = factor(
      usps_eval_clean,
      levels = 1:4,
      labels = c(
        "Excellent",
        "Good",
        "Only Fair",
        "Poor"
      )
    )
  )


library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

race_long <- issue %>%
  dplyr::select(usps_eval_factor, WEIGHT, white, black, hispanic) %>%
  filter(!is.na(usps_eval_factor)) %>%   # remove NA evaluation values
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(white, black, hispanic),
    names_to = "race",
    values_to = "member"
  ) %>%
  filter(member == 1) %>%                # keep only race members
  droplevels()                           # drop unused factor levels


race_eval_pct <- race_long %>%
  group_by(race, usps_eval_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    weighted_n = sum(WEIGHT, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(race) %>%
  mutate(
    pct = weighted_n / sum(weighted_n)
  )

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(
  race_eval_pct %>% filter(!is.na(usps_eval_factor)),
  aes(x = usps_eval_factor,
      y = pct,
      color = race,
      group = race)
) +
  
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +   # removes NA level
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(),
    limits = c(0,1)
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      white = "black",
      black = "steelblue",
      hispanic = "darkorange"
    ),
    labels = c(
      white = "White",
      black = "Black",
      hispanic = "Hispanic"
    )
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Mean Evaluation of the U.S. Postal Service by Race",
    x = "Evaluation of USPS",
    y = "Percent of Respondents",
    color = "Race"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)




issue <- issue %>%
  mutate(
    usps_eval_clean = na_if(usps_job_clean, -1)
  )



model_usps_race <- lm(
  usps_eval_clean ~ black + hispanic,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_usps_race)


model_usps_all <- lm(
  usps_eval_clean ~ race,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)
summary(model_usps_all)


model_usps_race <- lm(
  usps_eval_clean ~ black + hispanic,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)



model_usps_race <- lm(
  usps_eval_clean ~ black + hispanic,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

pred_data <- data.frame(
  black = c(0, 1, 0),
  hispanic = c(0, 0, 1)
)

pred_data$race <- c("White", "Black", "Hispanic")


pred_out <- predict(
  model_usps_race,
  newdata = pred_data,
  se.fit = TRUE
)

pred_data$fit <- pred_out$fit
pred_data$se <- pred_out$se.fit

pred_data$lower <- pred_data$fit - 1.96 * pred_data$se
pred_data$upper <- pred_data$fit + 1.96 * pred_data$se


library(ggplot2)

ggplot(pred_data, aes(x = race, y = fit, color = race)) +
  
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
    width = .15,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "White" = "black",
      "Black" = "steelblue",
      "Hispanic" = "darkorange"
    )
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(1,4),
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c(
      "Poor",
      "Only Fair",
      "Good",
      "Excellent"
    )
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Predicted USPS Evaluation by Race",
    x = "Race",
    y = "Predicted USPS Evaluation"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")





library(broom)
library(ggplot2)

coef_data <- broom::tidy(model_usps_race, conf.int = TRUE)

coef_data <- coef_data %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  mutate(
    race = case_when(
      term == "black" ~ "Black vs White",
      term == "hispanic" ~ "Hispanic vs White"
    )
  )

ggplot(coef_data, aes(x = estimate, y = race)) +
  
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high),
    height = .2,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  labs(
    title = "Difference in USPS Evaluation by Race",
    x = "Difference from White Respondents",
    y = ""
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)




```





```{r usps vbm and race}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

issue_race_graph <- issue %>%
  filter(
    ppethm %in% c(1, 2, 4),          # White, Black, Hispanic only
    !is.na(mail_pref),
    !is.na(usps_job_clean),
    !is.na(WEIGHT)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    race_group = case_when(
      ppethm == 1 ~ "White",
      ppethm == 2 ~ "Black",
      ppethm == 4 ~ "Hispanic"
    ),
    race_group = factor(race_group, levels = c("White", "Black", "Hispanic")),
    usps_eval_clean = as.numeric(usps_job_clean)
  )



model_vbm_usps_race <- glm(
  mail_pref ~ usps_eval_clean * race_group,
  family = binomial,
  data = issue_race_graph,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_vbm_usps_race)



pred_data <- expand.grid(
  usps_eval_clean = 1:4,
  race_group = c("White", "Black", "Hispanic")
)




pred_out <- predict(
  model_vbm_usps_race,
  newdata = pred_data,
  type = "link",
  se.fit = TRUE
)

pred_data$fit_link <- pred_out$fit
pred_data$se_link <- pred_out$se.fit

pred_data$fit <- plogis(pred_data$fit_link)
pred_data$lower <- plogis(pred_data$fit_link - 1.96 * pred_data$se_link)
pred_data$upper <- plogis(pred_data$fit_link + 1.96 * pred_data$se_link)



ggplot(pred_data,
       aes(x = usps_eval_clean,
           y = fit,
           color = race_group,
           fill = race_group,
           group = race_group)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
              alpha = 0.15,
              color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Excellent", "Good", "Only fair", "Poor")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "White" = "black",
      "Black" = "steelblue",
      "Hispanic" = "darkorange"
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "White" = "black",
      "Black" = "steelblue",
      "Hispanic" = "darkorange"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Preference for Vote by Mail by USPS Evaluation and Race/Ethnicity",
    x = "Evaluation of USPS Job Performance",
    y = "Predicted Probability of Preferring Vote by Mail",
    color = "Race/Ethnicity",
    fill = "Race/Ethnicity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1)
  )



```

White people on black v white
Call:
glm(formula = fairness_black_binary ~ dem + IDEO_clean, family = binomial, 
    data = white_data)

Coefficients:
            Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
(Intercept)  2.20875    0.49241   4.486 7.27e-06 ***
dem          1.79759    0.25358   7.089 1.35e-12 ***
IDEO_clean  -0.96196    0.09991  -9.629  < 2e-16 ***


Black on black v white
Call:
glm(formula = fairness_black_binary ~ dem + IDEO_clean, family = binomial, 
    data = black_data)

Coefficients:
            Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)  
(Intercept) -0.37010    1.09115  -0.339   0.7345  
dem          1.55044    0.72634   2.135   0.0328 *
IDEO_clean   0.07711    0.18520   0.416   0.6772  
---


Hispanic on hispanic v white

Call:
glm(formula = fairness_hisp_binary ~ dem + IDEO_clean, family = binomial, 
    data = hispanic_data)

Coefficients:
            Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)   
(Intercept)   0.9112     1.3406   0.680   0.4967   
dem           1.5934     0.8571   1.859   0.0630 . 
IDEO_clean   -0.6479     0.2292  -2.827   0.0047 **
---



```{r conservatives and racial fairness}



library(dplyr)

issue <- issue %>%
  mutate(
    fairness_black_binary2 = case_when(
      vote_fair_white_black == 1 ~ 1,                    # Whites advantaged
      vote_fair_white_black %in% c(2, 3) ~ 0,           # Blacks advantaged OR equal treatment
      vote_fair_white_black %in% c(-1) ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    fairness_hisp_binary2 = case_when(
      vote_fair_white_hispanic == 1 ~ 1,                # Whites advantaged
      vote_fair_white_hispanic %in% c(2, 3) ~ 0,        # Hispanics advantaged OR equal treatment
      vote_fair_white_hispanic %in% c(-1) ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

table(issue$fairness_black_binary2, useNA = "ifany")
table(issue$fairness_hisp_binary2, useNA = "ifany")



cons_subset <- issue %>%
  filter(
    IDEO_clean %in% c(6, 7),
    !is.na(suppression_perception_rev),
    !is.na(WEIGHT)
  )

extreme_cons_subset <- issue %>%
  filter(
    IDEO_clean == 7,
    !is.na(suppression_perception_rev),
    !is.na(WEIGHT)
  )


model_cons_black_fairness_w <- glm(
  fairness_black_binary2 ~ suppression_perception_rev,
  data = cons_subset,
  weights = WEIGHT,
  family = binomial
)

summary(model_cons_black_fairness_w)

#still positive suppression is correlated with white advantage



model_extreme_black_fairness_w <- glm(
  fairness_black_binary2 ~ suppression_perception_rev,
  data = extreme_cons_subset,
  weights = WEIGHT,
  family = binomial
)

summary(model_extreme_black_fairness_w)
#still positive more suppression belief is higher belief that white people have an easier time kind of significant



model_cons_hisp_fairness_w <- glm(
  fairness_hisp_binary2 ~ suppression_perception_rev,
  data = cons_subset,
  weights = WEIGHT,
  family = binomial
)

summary(model_cons_hisp_fairness_w)
#positive more suppression belief is higher belief that white people have an easier time kind of significant


model_extreme_hisp_fairness_w <- glm(
  fairness_hisp_binary2 ~ suppression_perception_rev,
  data = extreme_cons_subset,
  weights = WEIGHT,
  family = binomial
)

summary(model_extreme_hisp_fairness_w)
#still positive

```



```{r suppression/fraud and trust in institutions}
trust_data <- issue %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(WEIGHT),
    !is.na(suppression_perception_rev),
    !is.na(fraud_perception_rev)
  )


model_supp_leg <- lm(
  trust_legislature ~ suppression_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_supp_pres <- lm(
  trust_president ~ suppression_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_supp_cong <- lm(
  trust_congress ~ suppression_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_supp_state <- lm(
  trust_state_elections ~ suppression_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_supp_local <- lm(
  trust_local_elections ~ suppression_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)



summary(model_supp_leg)
#less suppression more trust on leg
summary(model_supp_pres)
#less suppress more trust in president
summary(model_supp_cong)
#less suppress more trust in congress
summary(model_supp_state)
#less suppress more trust in state
summary(model_supp_local)
#less suppress more trust in local



model_fraud_leg <- lm(
  trust_legislature ~ fraud_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_fraud_pres <- lm(
  trust_president ~ fraud_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_fraud_cong <- lm(
  trust_congress ~ fraud_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_fraud_state <- lm(
  trust_state_elections ~ fraud_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_fraud_local <- lm(
  trust_local_elections ~ fraud_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)


library(modelsummary)

modelsummary(
  list(
    "Suppression → Legislature" = model_supp_leg,
    "Suppression → President" = model_supp_pres,
    "Suppression → Congress" = model_supp_cong,
    "Suppression → State Elections" = model_supp_state,
    "Suppression → Local Elections" = model_supp_local,
    
    "Fraud → Legislature" = model_fraud_leg,
    "Fraud → President" = model_fraud_pres,
    "Fraud → Congress" = model_fraud_cong,
    "Fraud → State Elections" = model_fraud_state,
    "Fraud → Local Elections" = model_fraud_local
  )
)




summary(issue$fraud_perception_rev)
table(issue$fraud_perception_rev, useNA = "ifany")


trust_data <- issue %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(WEIGHT),
    !is.na(suppression_perception_rev),
    !is.na(fraud_perception_rev)
  )


nrow(trust_data)

model_fraud_leg <- lm(
  trust_legislature ~ fraud_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_fraud_pres <- lm(
  trust_president ~ fraud_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_fraud_cong <- lm(
  trust_congress ~ fraud_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_fraud_state <- lm(
  trust_state_elections ~ fraud_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_fraud_local <- lm(
  trust_local_elections ~ fraud_perception_rev,
  data = trust_data,
  weights = WEIGHT
)


summary(model_fraud_leg)
#higher fraud lower trust in leg
summary(model_fraud_pres)
#higher fraud higher trust in pres
summary(model_fraud_cong)
#higher fraud lower trust in cong
summary(model_fraud_state)
#higher fraud lower trust in state
summary(model_fraud_local)
#higher fraud lower trust in local





library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

plot_state <- issue %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(WEIGHT),
    !is.na(trust_state_elections),
    !is.na(suppression_perception_rev),
    !is.na(fraud_perception_rev)
  ) %>%
  group_by(suppression_perception_rev) %>%
  summarise(
    trust = weighted.mean(trust_state_elections, WEIGHT, na.rm = TRUE),
    type = "Suppression",
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(x = suppression_perception_rev) %>%
  bind_rows(
    issue %>%
      filter(
        !is.na(WEIGHT),
        !is.na(trust_state_elections),
        !is.na(fraud_perception_rev)
      ) %>%
      group_by(fraud_perception_rev) %>%
      summarise(
        trust = weighted.mean(trust_state_elections, WEIGHT, na.rm = TRUE),
        type = "Fraud",
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      rename(x = fraud_perception_rev)
  )

ggplot(plot_state, aes(x = x, y = trust, color = type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Rarely", "Occasionally", "Somewhat often", "Very often")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(1, 4),
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Not at all", "Not too much", "A good amount", "A great deal")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Trust in State Election Officials by Perceived Election Threat",
    x = "Perceived Frequency",
    y = "Trust",
    color = "Threat Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)








library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

trust_long <- issue %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(WEIGHT),
    !is.na(suppression_perception_rev),
    !is.na(fraud_perception_rev)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WEIGHT,
    suppression_perception_rev,
    fraud_perception_rev,
    trust_legislature,
    trust_president,
    trust_congress,
    trust_state_elections,
    trust_local_elections
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      trust_legislature,
      trust_president,
      trust_congress,
      trust_state_elections,
      trust_local_elections
    ),
    names_to = "institution",
    values_to = "trust"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(trust))



supp_plot <- trust_long %>%
  group_by(institution, x = suppression_perception_rev) %>%
  summarise(
    trust = weighted.mean(trust, WEIGHT, na.rm = TRUE),
    type = "Suppression",
    .groups = "drop"
  )

fraud_plot <- trust_long %>%
  group_by(institution, x = fraud_perception_rev) %>%
  summarise(
    trust = weighted.mean(trust, WEIGHT, na.rm = TRUE),
    type = "Fraud",
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_data <- bind_rows(supp_plot, fraud_plot) %>%
  mutate(
    institution = recode(
      institution,
      trust_legislature = "State Legislature",
      trust_president = "President",
      trust_congress = "Congress",
      trust_state_elections = "State Election Officials",
      trust_local_elections = "Local Election Officials"
    )
  )

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = x, y = trust, color = type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  facet_wrap(~institution) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Rarely", "Occasionally", "Somewhat often", "Very often")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(1, 4),
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Not at all", "Not too much", "A good amount", "A great deal")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Trust in Institutions by Perceived Fraud and Suppression",
    x = "Perceived Frequency",
    y = "Trust",
    color = "Threat Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
  )










library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

trust_long <- issue %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(WEIGHT),
    !is.na(suppression_perception_rev),
    !is.na(fraud_perception_rev)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WEIGHT,
    suppression_perception_rev,
    fraud_perception_rev,
    trust_legislature,
    trust_president,
    trust_congress,
    trust_state_elections,
    trust_local_elections
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      trust_legislature,
      trust_president,
      trust_congress,
      trust_state_elections,
      trust_local_elections
    ),
    names_to = "institution",
    values_to = "trust"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(trust))


pred_x <- data.frame(x = 1:4)

pred_supp <- map_df(names(models_supp), function(inst) {
  
  mod <- models_supp[[inst]]
  
  p <- predict(mod,
               newdata = data.frame(suppression_perception_rev = 1:4),
               se.fit = TRUE)
  
  data.frame(
    institution = inst,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = p$fit,
    lower = p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit,
    upper = p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit,
    type = "Suppression"
  )
})

pred_fraud <- map_df(names(models_fraud), function(inst) {
  
  mod <- models_fraud[[inst]]
  
  p <- predict(mod,
               newdata = data.frame(fraud_perception_rev = 1:4),
               se.fit = TRUE)
  
  data.frame(
    institution = inst,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = p$fit,
    lower = p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit,
    upper = p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit,
    type = "Fraud"
  )
})

pred_all <- bind_rows(pred_supp, pred_fraud)






library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)

trust_long <- issue %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(WEIGHT),
    !is.na(suppression_perception_rev),
    !is.na(fraud_perception_rev)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WEIGHT,
    suppression_perception_rev,
    fraud_perception_rev,
    trust_legislature,
    trust_president,
    trust_congress,
    trust_state_elections,
    trust_local_elections
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      trust_legislature,
      trust_president,
      trust_congress,
      trust_state_elections,
      trust_local_elections
    ),
    names_to = "institution",
    values_to = "trust"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(trust))

models_supp <- trust_long %>%
  split(.$institution) %>%
  map(~ lm(
    trust ~ suppression_perception_rev,
    data = .x,
    weights = WEIGHT
  ))

models_fraud <- trust_long %>%
  split(.$institution) %>%
  map(~ lm(
    trust ~ fraud_perception_rev,
    data = .x,
    weights = WEIGHT
  ))

pred_supp <- map_df(names(models_supp), function(inst) {
  mod <- models_supp[[inst]]
  p <- predict(
    mod,
    newdata = data.frame(suppression_perception_rev = 1:4),
    se.fit = TRUE
  )

  data.frame(
    institution = inst,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = as.numeric(p$fit),
    lower = as.numeric(p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    upper = as.numeric(p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    type = "Suppression"
  )
})

pred_fraud <- map_df(names(models_fraud), function(inst) {
  mod <- models_fraud[[inst]]
  p <- predict(
    mod,
    newdata = data.frame(fraud_perception_rev = 1:4),
    se.fit = TRUE
  )

  data.frame(
    institution = inst,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = as.numeric(p$fit),
    lower = as.numeric(p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    upper = as.numeric(p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    type = "Fraud"
  )
})

pred_all <- bind_rows(pred_supp, pred_fraud) %>%
  mutate(
    institution = recode(
      institution,
      trust_legislature = "State Legislature",
      trust_president = "President",
      trust_congress = "Congress",
      trust_state_elections = "State Election Officials",
      trust_local_elections = "Local Election Officials"
    )
  )

ggplot(pred_all,
       aes(x = x, y = fit, color = type, fill = type, group = type)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  facet_wrap(~institution) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Rarely", "Occasionally", "Somewhat often", "Very often")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(1, 4),
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Not at all", "Not too much", "A good amount", "A great deal")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Trust in Institutions by Perceived Fraud and Suppression",
    subtitle = "Weighted regression predictions with 95% confidence intervals",
    x = "Perceived Frequency",
    y = "Trust",
    color = "Threat Type",
    fill = "Threat Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
  )


library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)

trust_long <- issue %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(WEIGHT),
    !is.na(suppression_perception_rev),
    !is.na(fraud_perception_rev)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WEIGHT,
    suppression_perception_rev,
    fraud_perception_rev,
    trust_legislature,
    trust_president,
    trust_congress,
    trust_state_elections,
    trust_local_elections
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      trust_legislature,
      trust_president,
      trust_congress,
      trust_state_elections,
      trust_local_elections
    ),
    names_to = "institution",
    values_to = "trust"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(trust))

models_supp <- trust_long %>%
  split(.$institution) %>%
  map(~ lm(
    trust ~ suppression_perception_rev,
    data = .x,
    weights = WEIGHT
  ))

models_fraud <- trust_long %>%
  split(.$institution) %>%
  map(~ lm(
    trust ~ fraud_perception_rev,
    data = .x,
    weights = WEIGHT
  ))

pred_supp <- map_df(names(models_supp), function(inst) {
  mod <- models_supp[[inst]]
  p <- predict(
    mod,
    newdata = data.frame(suppression_perception_rev = 1:4),
    se.fit = TRUE
  )

  data.frame(
    institution = inst,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = as.numeric(p$fit),
    lower = as.numeric(p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    upper = as.numeric(p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    type = "Suppression"
  )
})

pred_fraud <- map_df(names(models_fraud), function(inst) {
  mod <- models_fraud[[inst]]
  p <- predict(
    mod,
    newdata = data.frame(fraud_perception_rev = 1:4),
    se.fit = TRUE
  )

  data.frame(
    institution = inst,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = as.numeric(p$fit),
    lower = as.numeric(p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    upper = as.numeric(p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    type = "Fraud"
  )
})

pred_all <- bind_rows(pred_supp, pred_fraud) %>%
  mutate(
    institution = recode(
      institution,
      trust_legislature = "State Legislature",
      trust_president = "President",
      trust_congress = "Congress",
      trust_state_elections = "State Election Officials",
      trust_local_elections = "Local Election Officials"
    )
  )

ggplot(pred_all,
       aes(x = x, y = fit, color = type, fill = type, group = type)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  facet_wrap(~institution) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Rarely", "Occasionally", "Somewhat often", "Very often")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(1, 4),
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Not at all", "Not too much", "A good amount", "A great deal")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Trust in Institutions by Perceived Fraud and Suppression",
    subtitle = "Weighted regression predictions with 95% confidence intervals",
    x = "Perceived Frequency",
    y = "Trust",
    color = "Threat Type",
    fill = "Threat Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
  )




pred_all %>%
  mutate(ci_width = upper - lower) %>%
  dplyr::select(institution, type, x, fit, lower, upper, ci_width)



ggplot(pred_all,
       aes(x = x, y = fit, color = type, fill = type, group = type)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  facet_wrap(~institution) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Rarely", "Occasionally", "Somewhat often", "Very often")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Not at all", "Not too much", "A good amount", "A great deal")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Trust in Institutions by Perceived Fraud and Suppression",
    subtitle = "Weighted regression predictions with 95% confidence intervals",
    x = "Perceived Frequency",
    y = "Trust",
    color = "Threat Type",
    fill = "Threat Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
  )





glimpse(issue)


issue$race <- factor(issue$race)

issue$race <- relevel(issue$race, ref = "White")
model_usps_all <- lm(
  usps_eval_clean ~ race,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_usps_all)







issue <- issue %>%
  mutate(
    race = case_when(
      white == 1 ~ "White",
      black == 1 ~ "Black",
      hispanic == 1 ~ "Hispanic",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

issue$race <- factor(issue$race)
issue$race <- relevel(issue$race, ref = "White")


table(issue$race, useNA = "ifany")
levels(issue$race)



model_usps_all <- lm(
  usps_eval_clean ~ race,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_usps_all)



```








```{r trust and suppresstion and fraud}
glimpse(issue)


library(dplyr)

issue <- issue %>%
  mutate(
    # ideology
    IDEO_clean = case_when(
      IDEO %in% 1:7 ~ as.numeric(IDEO),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # party ID cleaned
    PARTYID_clean = case_when(
      PARTYID %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(PARTYID),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # dem binary: Democrat = 1, Republican = 0, everyone else = NA
    dem = case_when(
      PARTYID_clean == 1 ~ 1,
      PARTYID_clean == 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # race dummies from ppethm
    white = case_when(
      ppethm == 1 ~ 1,
      ppethm %in% c(2, 3, 4, 5) ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    black = case_when(
      ppethm == 2 ~ 1,
      ppethm %in% c(1, 3, 4, 5) ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    hispanic = case_when(
      ppethm == 4 ~ 1,
      ppethm %in% c(1, 2, 3, 5) ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # fraud / suppression: remove -1, then reverse so higher = more often
    fraud_perception_clean = case_when(
      Q27 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q27),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    suppression_perception_clean = case_when(
      Q28 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q28),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    fraud_perception_rev = 5 - fraud_perception_clean,
    suppression_perception_rev = 5 - suppression_perception_clean,

    # trust variables from Q39
    # original scale: 1 = a great deal, 4 = not at all
    # reverse so higher = more trust
    trust_legislature_clean = case_when(
      Q39_1 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q39_1),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    trust_president_clean = case_when(
      Q39_5 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q39_5),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    trust_congress_clean = case_when(
      Q39_6 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q39_6),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    trust_state_elections_clean = case_when(
      Q39_3 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q39_3),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    trust_local_elections_clean = case_when(
      Q39_4 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q39_4),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    trust_legislature_rev = 5 - trust_legislature_clean,
    trust_president_rev = 5 - trust_president_clean,
    trust_congress_rev = 5 - trust_congress_clean,
    trust_state_elections_rev = 5 - trust_state_elections_clean,
    trust_local_elections_rev = 5 - trust_local_elections_clean
  )





issue <- issue %>%
  mutate(
    trust_legislature = na_if(Q39_1, -1),
    trust_president = na_if(Q39_2, -1),
    trust_congress = na_if(Q39_3, -1),
    trust_state_elections = na_if(Q39_4, -1),
    trust_local_elections = na_if(Q39_5, -1)
  )



summary(issue$trust_legislature)
summary(issue$trust_state_elections)


issue <- issue %>%
  mutate(
    trust_legislature_rev = 5 - trust_legislature,
    trust_president_rev = 5 - trust_president,
    trust_congress_rev = 5 - trust_congress,
    trust_state_elections_rev = 5 - trust_state_elections,
    trust_local_elections_rev = 5 - trust_local_elections
  )

table(issue$Q27, useNA = "ifany")
table(issue$Q28, useNA = "ifany")
table(issue$Q28a, useNA = "ifany")
table(issue$Q29, useNA = "ifany")

issue <- issue %>%
  mutate(
    Q27 = na_if(Q27, -1),
    Q28 = na_if(Q28, -1),
    Q28a = na_if(Q28a, -1),
    Q29 = na_if(Q29, -1)
  )

issue <- issue %>%
  mutate(
    suppression_perception = na_if(Q27, -1),
    fraud_perception = na_if(Q28, -1)
  )

table(issue$suppression_perception)
table(issue$fraud_perception)


issue <- issue %>%
  mutate(
    suppression_perception_rev = 5 - suppression_perception,
    fraud_perception_rev = 5 - fraud_perception
  )

table(issue$suppression_perception_rev)
table(issue$fraud_perception_rev)

model_supp_leg <- lm(
  suppression_perception_rev~ trust_legislature_rev + black + hispanic + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_supp_pres <- lm(
  suppression_perception_rev ~ trust_president_rev + black + hispanic + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_supp_cong <- lm(
  suppression_perception_rev ~ trust_congress_rev + black + hispanic + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_supp_state <- lm(
  suppression_perception_rev ~ trust_state_elections_rev + black + hispanic + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_supp_local <- lm(
  suppression_perception_rev ~ trust_local_elections_rev + black + hispanic + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_fraud_leg <- lm(
  fraud_perception_rev ~ trust_legislature_rev + black + hispanic + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_fraud_pres <- lm(
  fraud_perception_rev ~ trust_president_rev + black + hispanic + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_fraud_cong <- lm(
  fraud_perception_rev ~ trust_congress_rev + black + hispanic + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_fraud_state <- lm(
  fraud_perception_rev ~ trust_state_elections_rev + black + hispanic + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

model_fraud_local <- lm(
  fraud_perception_rev ~ trust_local_elections_rev + black + hispanic + dem + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)



summary(model_supp_leg)
summary(model_supp_pres)
summary(model_supp_cong)
summary(model_supp_state)
summary(model_supp_local)

summary(model_fraud_leg)
summary(model_fraud_pres)
summary(model_fraud_cong)
summary(model_fraud_state)
summary(model_fraud_local)


model_supp_all <- lm(
  suppression_perception_rev ~ 
    trust_legislature_rev +
    trust_president_rev +
    trust_congress_rev +
    trust_state_elections_rev +
    trust_local_elections_rev,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_supp_all)

model_fraud_all <- lm(
  fraud_perception_rev ~ 
    trust_legislature_rev +
    trust_president_rev +
    trust_congress_rev +
    trust_state_elections_rev +
    trust_local_elections_rev,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_fraud_all)



issue <- issue %>%
  mutate(
    dem_binary = case_when(
      PARTYID_clean == 1 ~ 1,          # Democrat
      PARTYID_clean %in% c(2,3,4) ~ 0, # everyone else
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )


model_supp_allcontrol <- lm(
  suppression_perception_rev ~ 
    trust_legislature_rev +
    trust_president_rev +
    trust_congress_rev +
    trust_state_elections_rev +
    trust_local_elections_rev + black + hispanic + dem_binary + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_supp_allcontrol)

model_fraud_allcontrol <- lm(
  fraud_perception_rev ~ 
    trust_legislature_rev +
    trust_president_rev +
    trust_congress_rev +
    trust_state_elections_rev +
    trust_local_elections_rev + black + hispanic + dem_binary + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_fraud_allcontrol)





library(broom)
library(dplyr)

supp_tidy <- tidy(model_supp_allcontrol) %>%
  filter(grepl("trust_", term)) %>%
  mutate(outcome = "Suppression")

fraud_tidy <- tidy(model_fraud_allcontrol) %>%
  filter(grepl("trust_", term)) %>%
  mutate(outcome = "Fraud")

coef_data <- bind_rows(supp_tidy, fraud_tidy)



coef_data <- coef_data %>%
  mutate(
    term = case_when(
      term == "trust_legislature_rev" ~ "Legislature",
      term == "trust_president_rev" ~ "President",
      term == "trust_congress_rev" ~ "Congress",
      term == "trust_state_elections_rev" ~ "State Elections",
      term == "trust_local_elections_rev" ~ "Local Elections",
      TRUE ~ term
    )
  )


library(ggplot2)

ggplot(coef_data,
       aes(x = estimate,
           y = term,
           color = outcome)) +

  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.4), size = 3) +

  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = estimate - 1.96 * std.error,
        xmax = estimate + 1.96 * std.error),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.4),
    height = 0.2
  ) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +

  labs(
    title = "Effects of Institutional Trust on 
    Perceptions of Suppression and Fraud",
    x = "Coefficient (Effect on Outcome)",
    y = "Type of Trust",
    color = "Outcome"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)



ggplot(coef_data,
       aes(x = estimate,
           y = term)) +

  geom_point(size = 3) +

  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = estimate - 1.96 * std.error,
        xmax = estimate + 1.96 * std.error),
    height = 0.2
  ) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +

  facet_wrap(~ outcome) +

  theme_minimal()




library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)

trust_vars <- c(
  "trust_legislature_rev",
  "trust_president_rev",
  "trust_congress_rev",
  "trust_state_elections_rev",
  "trust_local_elections_rev"
)

get_preds <- function(var, model, outcome_label, data) {

  base <- data %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      trust_legislature_rev = mean(trust_legislature_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_president_rev = mean(trust_president_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_congress_rev = mean(trust_congress_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_state_elections_rev = mean(trust_state_elections_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_local_elections_rev = mean(trust_local_elections_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      black = mean(black, na.rm = TRUE),
      hispanic = mean(hispanic, na.rm = TRUE),
      dem_binary = mean(dem_binary, na.rm = TRUE),
      IDEO_clean = mean(IDEO_clean, na.rm = TRUE)
    )

  newdata <- base[rep(1, 4), ]
  newdata[[var]] <- 1:4

  p <- predict(model, newdata = newdata, se.fit = TRUE)

  data.frame(
    trust = var,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = as.numeric(p$fit),
    lower = as.numeric(p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    upper = as.numeric(p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    outcome = outcome_label
  )
}

pred_supp <- map_df(
  trust_vars,
  ~get_preds(.x, model_supp_allcontrol, "Suppression", issue)
)

pred_fraud <- map_df(
  trust_vars,
  ~get_preds(.x, model_fraud_allcontrol, "Fraud", issue)
)

pred_all <- bind_rows(pred_supp, pred_fraud)

pred_all <- pred_all %>%
  mutate(
    trust = recode(trust,
      "trust_legislature_rev" = "Legislature",
      "trust_president_rev" = "President",
      "trust_congress_rev" = "Congress",
      "trust_state_elections_rev" = "State Elections",
      "trust_local_elections_rev" = "Local Elections"
    )
  )


#######this graph

ggplot(pred_all,
       aes(x = x, y = fit, color = outcome)) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = outcome),
    alpha = 0.2,
    color = NA
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ trust) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Predicted Effects of Trust on Suppression and Fraud Beliefs",
    x = "Level of Trust (Low → High)",
    y = "Predicted Perception",
    color = "Outcome",
    fill = "Outcome"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)



```





```{r likelihood vol by partisanship}



library(dplyr)

issue <- issue %>%
  mutate(
    party_factor = case_when(
      PARTYID %in% c(1, 2, 3, 4) ~ as.numeric(PARTYID),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    party_factor = factor(
      party_factor,
      levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
      labels = c("Democrat", "Republican", "Independent", "Other")
    ),

    volunteer_binary = case_when(
      Q42 == 1 ~ 1,   # Yes
      Q42 == 2 ~ 0,   # No
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    pollworker_binary = case_when(
      Q44 == 1 ~ 1,   # Willing
      Q44 == 2 ~ 0,   # Not willing
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )


table(issue$party_factor, useNA = "ifany")
table(issue$volunteer_binary, useNA = "ifany")
table(issue$pollworker_binary, useNA = "ifany")


volunteer_party <- issue %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(party_factor),
    !is.na(volunteer_binary),
    !is.na(WEIGHT)
  ) %>%
  group_by(party_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    pct_volunteer = weighted.mean(volunteer_binary, WEIGHT, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

volunteer_party



pollworker_party <- issue %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(party_factor),
    !is.na(pollworker_binary),
    !is.na(WEIGHT)
  ) %>%
  group_by(party_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    pct_pollworker = weighted.mean(pollworker_binary, WEIGHT, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pollworker_party


model_volunteer_party <- glm(
  volunteer_binary ~ party_factor,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT,
  family = binomial
)

summary(model_volunteer_party)

model_pollworker_party <- glm(
  pollworker_binary ~ party_factor,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT,
  family = binomial
)

summary(model_pollworker_party)


model_volunteer_party_ctrl <- glm(
  volunteer_binary ~ party_factor + IDEO_clean + black + hispanic,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT,
  family = binomial
)

summary(model_volunteer_party_ctrl)

model_pollworker_party_ctrl <- glm(
  pollworker_binary ~ party_factor + IDEO_clean + black + hispanic,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT,
  family = binomial
)
summary(model_pollworker_party_ctrl)




library(ggplot2)

ggplot(volunteer_party, aes(x = party_factor, y = pct_volunteer)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(pct_volunteer * 100, 1), "%")),
            vjust = -0.4, size = 4) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(),
                     limits = c(0, max(volunteer_party$pct_volunteer) + 0.05)) +
  labs(
    title = "Likelihood of Volunteering by Partisanship",
    x = "Partisanship",
    y = "Weighted Percent"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)



library(ggplot2)

ggplot(volunteer_party, aes(x = party_factor, y = pct_volunteer)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(pct_volunteer * 100, 1), "%")),
            vjust = -0.4, size = 4) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(),
                     limits = c(0, max(volunteer_party$pct_volunteer) + 0.05)) +
  labs(
    title = "Likelihood of Volunteering by Partisanship",
    x = "Partisanship",
    y = "Weighted Percent"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)



ggplot(pollworker_party, aes(x = party_factor, y = pct_pollworker)) +
  geom_col(fill = "darkorange") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(pct_pollworker * 100, 1), "%")),
            vjust = -0.4, size = 4) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(),
                     limits = c(0, max(pollworker_party$pct_pollworker) + 0.05)) +
  labs(
    title = "Interest in Being a Poll Worker by Partisanship",
    x = "Partisanship",
    y = "Weighted Percent"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)




library(ggplot2)

pred_party <- data.frame(
  party_factor = factor(
    c("Democrat", "Republican", "Independent", "Other"),
    levels = levels(issue$party_factor)
  )
)

pred_out <- predict(
  model_volunteer_party,
  newdata = pred_party,
  type = "link",
  se.fit = TRUE
)

pred_party <- pred_party %>%
  mutate(
    fit = plogis(pred_out$fit),
    lower = plogis(pred_out$fit - 1.96 * pred_out$se.fit),
    upper = plogis(pred_out$fit + 1.96 * pred_out$se.fit)
  )

ggplot(pred_party, aes(x = party_factor, y = fit)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.15, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted Probability of Volunteering by Partisanship",
    x = "Partisanship",
    y = "Probability of Volunteering"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)




pred_party_pw <- data.frame(
  party_factor = factor(
    c("Democrat", "Republican", "Independent", "Other"),
    levels = levels(issue$party_factor)
  )
)

pred_out_pw <- predict(
  model_pollworker_party,
  newdata = pred_party_pw,
  type = "link",
  se.fit = TRUE
)

pred_party_pw <- pred_party_pw %>%
  mutate(
    fit = plogis(pred_out_pw$fit),
    lower = plogis(pred_out_pw$fit - 1.96 * pred_out_pw$se.fit),
    upper = plogis(pred_out_pw$fit + 1.96 * pred_out_pw$se.fit)
  )


ggplot(pred_party_pw, aes(x = party_factor, y = fit)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, color = "darkorange") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.15, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted Probability of Poll Worker Interest by Partisanship",
    x = "Partisanship",
    y = "Probability"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)


pred_party$type <- "Volunteering"
pred_party_pw$type <- "Poll Worker"

combined_preds <- bind_rows(pred_party, pred_party_pw)





ggplot(combined_preds,
       aes(x = party_factor, y = fit, color = type)) +
  
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.3),
    width = 0.15
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Civic Participation by Partisanship",
    x = "Partisanship",
    y = "Predicted Probability",
    color = "Activity"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)





library(ggeffects)

ggeffect(model_volunteer_party_ctrl, terms = "party_factor")






library(broom)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

vol_diff <- tidy(model_volunteer_party_ctrl) %>%
  filter(grepl("^party_factor", term)) %>%
  mutate(
    activity = "Volunteering"
  )

poll_diff <- tidy(model_pollworker_party_ctrl) %>%
  filter(grepl("^party_factor", term)) %>%
  mutate(
    activity = "Poll Worker Interest"
  )

diff_plot <- bind_rows(vol_diff, poll_diff)

diff_plot <- diff_plot %>%
  mutate(
    party = case_when(
      term == "party_factorRepublican" ~ "Republican vs Democrat",
      term == "party_factorIndependent" ~ "Independent vs Democrat",
      term == "party_factorOther" ~ "Other vs Democrat",
      TRUE ~ term
    )
  )

diff_plot <- diff_plot %>%
  mutate(
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * std.error,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * std.error
  )


ggplot(diff_plot,
       aes(x = estimate, y = party, color = activity)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    height = 0.2,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Partisan Differences Relative to Democrats",
    x = "Difference in Log-Odds",
    y = "",
    color = "Activity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)


ggplot(diff_plot,
       aes(x = estimate, y = party)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper),
    height = 0.2,
    linewidth = 1,
    color = "steelblue"
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~activity) +
  labs(
    title = "Partisan Differences Relative to Democrats",
    x = "Difference in Log-Odds",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

```

```{r redo trust and fraud and suppression}

table(issue$trust_local_elections_rev)

get_preds_correct <- function(var, model, outcome_label, data) {
  
  # Get means for controls
  base <- data %>%
    summarise(
      trust_legislature_rev = mean(trust_legislature_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_president_rev = mean(trust_president_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_congress_rev = mean(trust_congress_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_state_elections_rev = mean(trust_state_elections_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_local_elections_rev = mean(trust_local_elections_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      black = mean(black, na.rm = TRUE),
      hispanic = mean(hispanic, na.rm = TRUE),
      dem_binary = mean(dem_binary, na.rm = TRUE),
      IDEO_clean = mean(IDEO_clean, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  
  # Expand across trust levels
  newdata <- base[rep(1, 4), ]
  newdata[[var]] <- 1:4
  
  p <- predict(model, newdata = newdata, se.fit = TRUE)
  
  data.frame(
    trust = var,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = p$fit,
    lower = p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit,
    upper = p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit,
    outcome = outcome_label
  )
}




get_preds_correct <- function(var, model, outcome_label, data) {
  
  # Get means for controls
  base <- data %>%
    summarise(
      trust_legislature_rev = mean(trust_legislature_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_president_rev = mean(trust_president_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_congress_rev = mean(trust_congress_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_state_elections_rev = mean(trust_state_elections_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_local_elections_rev = mean(trust_local_elections_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      black = mean(black, na.rm = TRUE),
      hispanic = mean(hispanic, na.rm = TRUE),
      dem_binary = mean(dem_binary, na.rm = TRUE),
      IDEO_clean = mean(IDEO_clean, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  
  # Expand across trust levels
  newdata <- base[rep(1, 4), ]
  newdata[[var]] <- 1:4
  
  p <- predict(model, newdata = newdata, se.fit = TRUE)
  
  data.frame(
    trust = var,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = p$fit,
    lower = p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit,
    upper = p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit,
    outcome = outcome_label
  )
}


ggplot(pred_all,
       aes(x = x, y = fit, color = outcome)) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = outcome),
    alpha = 0.2,
    color = NA
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ trust) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Effect of Trust on Perceptions of Suppression and Fraud",
    x = "Trust Level (Low → High)",
    y = "Predicted Perception",
    color = "Outcome",
    fill = "Outcome"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)


summary(issue$trust_local_elections_rev)



table(issue$suppression_perception_rev)
table(issue$fraud_perception_rev)









library(dplyr)

issue <- issue %>%
  mutate(
    # ideology
    IDEO_clean = case_when(
      IDEO %in% 1:7 ~ as.numeric(IDEO),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # party
    PARTYID_clean = case_when(
      PARTYID %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(PARTYID),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    dem_binary = case_when(
      PARTYID_clean == 1 ~ 1,
      PARTYID_clean %in% c(2, 3, 4) ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # race
    black = case_when(
      ppethm == 2 ~ 1,
      ppethm %in% c(1, 3, 4, 5) ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    hispanic = case_when(
      ppethm == 4 ~ 1,
      ppethm %in% c(1, 2, 3, 5) ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # trust variables: original 1 = high trust, 4 = low trust
    trust_legislature_clean = case_when(
      Q39_1 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q39_1),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    trust_state_elections_clean = case_when(
      Q39_3 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q39_3),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    trust_local_elections_clean = case_when(
      Q39_4 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q39_4),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    trust_president_clean = case_when(
      Q39_5 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q39_5),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    trust_congress_clean = case_when(
      Q39_6 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q39_6),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    trust_legislature_rev = 5 - trust_legislature_clean,
    trust_state_elections_rev = 5 - trust_state_elections_clean,
    trust_local_elections_rev = 5 - trust_local_elections_clean,
    trust_president_rev = 5 - trust_president_clean,
    trust_congress_rev = 5 - trust_congress_clean,

    # IMPORTANT: Q27 = fraud, Q28 = suppression
    fraud_perception_clean = case_when(
      Q27 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q27),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    suppression_perception_clean = case_when(
      Q28 %in% 1:4 ~ as.numeric(Q28),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # reverse so higher = more often
    fraud_perception_rev = 5 - fraud_perception_clean,
    suppression_perception_rev = 5 - suppression_perception_clean
  )


table(issue$fraud_perception_rev, useNA = "ifany")
table(issue$suppression_perception_rev, useNA = "ifany")



model_supp_allcontrol <- lm(
  suppression_perception_rev ~ 
    trust_legislature_rev +
    trust_president_rev +
    trust_congress_rev +
    trust_state_elections_rev +
    trust_local_elections_rev +
    black + hispanic + dem_binary + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_supp_allcontrol)




model_fraud_allcontrol <- lm(
  fraud_perception_rev ~ 
    trust_legislature_rev +
    trust_president_rev +
    trust_congress_rev +
    trust_state_elections_rev +
    trust_local_elections_rev +
    black + hispanic + dem_binary + IDEO_clean,
  data = issue,
  weights = WEIGHT
)

summary(model_fraud_allcontrol)












library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)

trust_vars <- c(
  "trust_legislature_rev",
  "trust_president_rev",
  "trust_congress_rev",
  "trust_state_elections_rev",
  "trust_local_elections_rev"
)

get_preds_correct <- function(var, model, outcome_label, data) {
  
  base <- data %>%
    summarise(
      trust_legislature_rev = mean(trust_legislature_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_president_rev = mean(trust_president_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_congress_rev = mean(trust_congress_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_state_elections_rev = mean(trust_state_elections_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      trust_local_elections_rev = mean(trust_local_elections_rev, na.rm = TRUE),
      black = mean(black, na.rm = TRUE),
      hispanic = mean(hispanic, na.rm = TRUE),
      dem_binary = mean(dem_binary, na.rm = TRUE),
      IDEO_clean = mean(IDEO_clean, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  
  newdata <- base[rep(1, 4), ]
  newdata[[var]] <- 1:4
  
  p <- predict(model, newdata = newdata, se.fit = TRUE)
  
  data.frame(
    trust = var,
    x = 1:4,
    fit = as.numeric(p$fit),
    lower = as.numeric(p$fit - 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    upper = as.numeric(p$fit + 1.96 * p$se.fit),
    outcome = outcome_label
  )
}

pred_supp <- map_df(
  trust_vars,
  ~get_preds_correct(.x, model_supp_allcontrol, "Suppression", issue)
)

pred_fraud <- map_df(
  trust_vars,
  ~get_preds_correct(.x, model_fraud_allcontrol, "Fraud", issue)
)

pred_all <- bind_rows(pred_supp, pred_fraud) %>%
  mutate(
    trust = case_when(
      trust == "trust_legislature_rev" ~ "Legislature",
      trust == "trust_president_rev" ~ "President",
      trust == "trust_congress_rev" ~ "Congress",
      trust == "trust_state_elections_rev" ~ "State Elections",
      trust == "trust_local_elections_rev" ~ "Local Elections",
      TRUE ~ trust
    )
  )

ggplot(pred_all, aes(x = x, y = fit, color = outcome, fill = outcome)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.18, color = NA) +
  facet_wrap(~ trust) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("Low", "2", "3", "High")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    limits = c(min(pred_all$lower), max(pred_all$upper))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted Effects of Trust on Perceptions of Suppression and Fraud",
    x = "Trust Level",
    y = "Predicted Perception",
    color = "Outcome",
    fill = "Outcome"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)


```
